use_cases: Landing page hero sections with animated brand names
Entertainment or media site visual accents
ai_summary: A mesmerizing kinetic typography component featuring layered text with a continuous dance animation effect. The component uses CSS keyframes to create dynamic scaling, rotation, and opacity transitions with glowing orange-red text shadows on a dark backdrop. Perfect for creating eye-catching animated headlines in landing pages, hero sections, or creative website elements where visual impact is essential.
